environment_notes: Local real backend start was blocked by DATABASE_URL validation: Prisma requires a mysql:// URL. This is an environment configuration issue, not a TypeScript/build failure.

Because local real backend could not start, browser validation used a deterministic local mock API on port 3001 through the same Vite /api proxy. Production deploy smoke validated the real API route, DB columns, health, and frontend after migration.
known_deferred_items: Golden grader parity against the full 15-case live Anthropic set is not run locally because it requires a live Anthropic API key/config and incurs model calls.
v11 prototype urgency/ask/confidence chips are intentionally not implemented because extractor-spec marks them outside retained v1 scope.
